---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
cognirepo init
cognirepo index-repo .
# exact command that triggers the bug
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output.

## Environment

```
OS:
Python version: (python --version)
CogniRepo version: (cognirepo --version)
Install method: (pip install cognirepo / pip install -e .)
```

## Doctor output

```
cognirepo doctor --verbose
(paste output here)
```

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or log files.
